baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Upgrade this Node Stripe integration to the latest API version and update webhooks.
evals.expected_output: A Stripe upgrade plan or patch that checks changelog impacts, pins the target API version, updates SDK usage, and validates webhook behavior.
assertions: Identifies current and target Stripe API versions.
Reviews relevant changelog or upgrade guide changes.
Updates explicit apiVersion usage where appropriate.
